title: astilbe thunbergii var. formosa
intro: Astilbe thunbergii var. formosa is a variety of the Astilbe plant, commonly known as the Chinese Astilbe, which is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine, where its roots and rhizomes are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling in the body. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Astilbe thunbergii var. formosa are often dried and used as a decoction or made into a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
